name: proporacle-mobile
description: Capacitor shell: by default loads bundled mobile/www in the APK; optional remote URL via PROPORACLE_SERVER_URL + sync:remote.

scripts.bundle:android: npm run bundle:www && npm run sync:bundle
scripts.sync:bundle: PowerShell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Remove-Item Env:\PROPORACLE_SERVER_URL -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; npm run sync:android"
scripts.sync:remote: PowerShell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$u = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('PROPORACLE_SERVER_URL','Process'); if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($u)) { throw 'Set PROPORACLE_SERVER_URL to your https Railway URL, then run npm run sync:remote again.' }; if (-not ($u.StartsWith('https://'))) { throw 'Remote UI must use https://' }; npm run sync:android"
scripts.sync:url: PowerShell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$u=$env:npm_config_url; if (-not $u) { throw 'Usage: npm run sync:url --url=http://IP:PORT'; }; $env:PROPORACLE_SERVER_URL=$u; npm run sync:android"
scripts.clean-deploy:android: npm run sync:android && npm run clean:android && npm run open:android
